channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Iron Maiden Enforce Phone-Free Standing Area at Paris La Défense Arena Show
item.description: 📵 Iron Maiden brings the rock without distractions! Who's ready to rock out phone-free at their Paris show? 🎸 #IronMaiden #RockOn

item.title: The 2026 Coney Island Mermaid Parade in (NSFW) pics
item.description: 🧜‍♀️🌊 Dive into the sea of colorful vibes at the 2026 Coney Island Mermaid Parade! 🎶📸 #MermaidMagic #MusicVibes

item.title: Travis Kelce Joins Chris Lake, Who Remixed Taylor Swift’s ‘Opalite,’ on Stage in L.A.
item.description: 🎉 When sports and music collide! Travis Kelce lit up the stage with Chris Lake in L.A.! 🎶🏈 #UnexpectedCollab #MusicMeetsFootball

item.title: Ariana Grande Announces Full ‘Petal’ Tracklist
item.description: 🌸 Dive into the world of Ariana Grande with the complete 'Petal' tracklist! Which song are you most excited for? 🎶 #ArianaGrande #NewMusicAlert

item.title: The Beatles’ Long-Lost First-Ever ‘Top of the Pops’ Performance Has Been Found
item.description: 🎉 Unearthed treasure alert! The Beatles' iconic ‘Top of the Pops’ debut has been discovered! Let the nostalgia trip begin! 🎸 #TheBeatles #MusicDiscovery
